name: mamma_mia_pet_hair_v1

costar.context: IG static, pet owners scrolling evening, budget renters
costar.objective: Click link-in-bio to Mamma Mia Covers tracking link
costar.audience: Pet owners 25-45 with couch destroyed by fur
costar.response_format: Hook (dollar + problem) / 3 products with prices / CTA

caption:
My couch was 90% dog hair. Gave up. Then I found this.

Mamma Mia Sofa Cover — $39. Machine washable, grips like a seatbelt, 30+ colors. Pulls off in 2 min, throws in the wash, looks brand new.

Also added:
• Pet-proof armchair cover — $24
• Cushion covers (4-pack) — $28

Total spent: $91. Dog still sheds. Couch still looks new. Link in bio.

#petparent #couchprotector #petsofinstagram #homedecoronabudget #amazonfinds

name: eli_and_elm_morning_pain_v1

costar.context: IG static, side sleepers with chronic neck pain
costar.objective: Click to Eli & Elm tracking link
costar.audience: 30-50 side sleepers waking with neck stiffness
costar.response_format: Problem state / product spec / price proof / CTA

caption:
Waking up with a stiff neck every morning? Your pillow is the reason.

Eli & Elm Side Sleeper Pillow — $99 (down from $150). Cut-out shoulder channel, adjustable fill, cooling cover. 4.8 stars from 2,400+ reviews. Made in USA. Back pain gone in under a week.

Pair with their cotton-bamboo Weighted Blanket — $149. Non-negotiable sleep upgrade.

Link in bio for both.

#sidesleeper #neckpainrelief #bettersleep #bedroomreset #sleepupgrade

name: eli_and_elm_weighted_blanket_v1

caption:
Used to lie awake for 45 minutes with my brain on fire. One change fixed it.

Eli & Elm Weighted Blanket — $149. Cotton + bamboo blend, breathable so you don't overheat. 15 lbs is the sweet spot for most adults.

Pair it with their Side Sleeper Pillow — $99. Made in USA. Both are worth every dollar.
